description: Legal fragment written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE), comprising the lower left corner of the document. Probably regarding a business partnership between Menashshe b. Moshe and ʿEli ha-Parnas. Also signed by Nissim b. Natan, Shelomo b. Shela, and Yehuda b. Saʿadya.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
